narrative:
Buffalo/Seneca (precinct in Noble County) has 896 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
